title: cacalia xanthophylla
intro: Cacalia xanthophylla, also known as the Yellow Buttons or Yellow Cacalia, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Cacalia xanthophylla can be prepared as a tea, extract, or tincture for use in herbal medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
